ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "pubmed_id" INTEGER /* PubMed ID of the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "type_of_publication" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., review, original research, preprint) */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level (low, medium, high) */,
  "proposed_by" TEXT /* User who proposed the publication */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the proposer */,
  "proposed_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was proposed */,
  "available" TEXT /* Availability status (Yes, No) */,
  "is_in_elixir" INTEGER /* Indicates if the publication is in Elixir */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the publication (e.g., Slack, email) */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* General remarks about the publication */,
  "additional_remarks_1" TEXT /* Additional remarks 1 */,
  "additional_remarks_2" TEXT /* Additional remarks 2 */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the publication */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the publication (e.g., draft, published, withdrawn) */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "open_access" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the publication is open access */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the publication was last updated */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Detailed status of the review process (e.g., under review, accepted, rejected) */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the review process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier of the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* H-index of the author */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Additional contact information (e.g., phone, address) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the publication (e.g., first author, corresponding author) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submaps" (
  "submap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submap */,
  "submap_name" TEXT /* Name of the submap */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the submap */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the submap (e.g., proposed, active, deprecated) */,
  "curator" TEXT /* User who is responsible for curating the submap */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the submap was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submap_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_submaps" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "submap_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submap */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of how the publication contributes to the submap */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id", "submap_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data curator, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or array of permissions the user has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proposals" (
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proposal */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the proposed publication */,
  "proposed_by" TEXT /* User who proposed the publication */,
  "proposed_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was proposed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the proposal (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the proposal (e.g., new data, correction) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the proposal was reviewed */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the review process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proposal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proposals_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_diagrams" (
  "diagram_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagram */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication used in the diagram */,
  "diagram_name" TEXT /* Name of the diagram */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the diagram */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the diagram (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "curator" TEXT /* User who is responsible for curating the diagram */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the diagram was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagram_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_diagrams_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threading) */,
  "visibility" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is visible to all users or only to the publication owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_comments_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the publication */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Details of the changes made in this version */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Detailed status of the review process for this version */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the review process for this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_versions_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_publications" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of how the publication contributes to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword or tag associated with the publication */,
  "relevance" INTEGER /* Relevance score of the keyword to the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_keywords_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., CSV, Excel, SQL) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_datasets_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_readme" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the readme file was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the readme file */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the readme file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_readme_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the publication */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the publication */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_access_logs_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
